scenarios.name: AA_premium
scenarios.snapshot:
=== PREFLOP | Button | A♠ A♥ ===
Pot: 4.5 BB | Odds: 1.5:1
Hand: Pocket As (premium_pair, strength 1.00)
Archetype: three_bet_pots (confidence 0.85)
Actions: Fold | Call 3.0 | Raise 5.0-100.0
GTO (preflop-classification): raise_large: 95%, call: 3%, fold: 2% → raise_large
Action stories:
  fold: "I'm stepping aside — this hand isn't worth playing from here."
  call: "I'm calling to see a flop. My hand plays well postflop but raising reveals too much."
  raise: "I'm raising to thin the field and build the pot with position or a strong hand."

COACH (clear): You're on the Button with A♠ A♥. Hijack opened to 3 BB — you're deciding whether to enter this pot. Hijack raiseed 3 BB. Your Pocket As is strong. You have a clear story to tell. Raise. You're likely ahead — raising builds the pot when you have the edge. AA is in the BTN 3-bet range. Always raise.
